free_text: Study of the He-4(g,p)H-3 and He-4(g,n)He-3
Cloud chamber filled with helium gas.
The absolute  photoproton  and   photoneutron   cross
sections  were  measured  using  the measurements of
charge particle tracks in cloud chamber.
intensity  of  the  photon  beam   measurement   was
The cross sections and angular distributions for  the
reactions  He-4(g,p)H-3  and He-4(g,n)He-3 have been
measured using the cloud chamber filled with  helium
gas  in  magnetic  field.  It  was obtained that the
cross sections of the (g,p) and (g,n)  reactions  on
he-4  are  equal  within  the statistical errors for
INT,,BRA -> INT,,BRS in REACTION of SUBENTs 004-006,
